name: Truplayerz Sports Training & Upper Deck Lounge
amenities_list: auto-tee|led putting guide|self-serve tap wall| retractable netting|high-speed camera sensors|climate controlled|restrooms|private event space

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While bringing your own clubs is recommended for the best experience, the venue does not explicitly specify if rentals are available. It is best to contact them directly regarding club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink policies are not specified. However, the venue features a self-pour tap wall with alcoholic beverages, suggesting they prefer customers to consume their products.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, playing 18 holes on a golf simulator takes approximately 45 to 60 minutes per player, though this can vary based on the simulator settings and group size.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and youth-oriented. They offer youth training clinics, birthday party packages, and spring training programs for children.

food_and_drink.notes: Self-pour tap wall with 18 different options including beer and seltzer.
Full menu implied by the 'Lounge' designation and private event capabilities.

simulator_hardware.notes: Features 24-direction moving swing plate, multi-surface hitting mats, and auto-tee.

about: TruPlayerz Sports Training is a multi-sport indoor facility located in the South Metro area that combines serious athletic training with a social entertainment experience. The venue features two state-of-the-art Golfzon simulators equipped with advanced technology such as 24-direction moving swing plates, high-speed camera sensors, LED putting guides, and auto-tees. Beyond golf, the facility serves as a comprehensive baseball and softball training center, offering HitTrax leagues, batting cages, multi-use tunnels, and professional instruction. The on-site Upper Deck Lounge provides a relaxed environment with a self-pour tap wall, making it suitable for both practice sessions and private gatherings. The facility caters to athletes of all ages, offering memberships, camps, and clinics, while also providing options for corporate events and birthday parties.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced Golfzon simulators with moving swing plates and auto-tees
Dual-function facility for both golf and baseball practice
Social atmosphere with a tap wall and lounge area
Private event space for group outings
Youth-friendly programs and birthday party options
